title: DoorDash
html:
DoorDash

Gig-economy delivery platform that surfaces in the corpus as bridge-income — the side hustle layered on top of harder cash sources during the Austin thesis survival window.

Chronology

  • 2020-11-15 — 2020 11 15 scholarship essays — first vault appearance (essay-context mention)
  • 2021-04-15 — 2021 04 15 restaurant todos — restaurant-side awareness
  • 2025-09-20 — 2025 09 20 on Austin — Austin-arrival reality check; gig-economy options on the table
  • 2025-09-23 — 2025 09 23 how im scraping by — "DoorDash for a cushion" — the canonical line, paired with the overnight gym shift as the secondary bridge income stack

Why it matters

DoorDash is the soft-floor of the Austin survival ledger — not the primary cash source (the overnight gym shift is) but the elastic top-up. Pairs with Facebook Marketplace flips as Yahir's two flexible levers during the Austin no-runway window. Sits inside the no runway discipline frame: never the headline answer, always part of the stack.

Source summaries

  • 2025 09 23 how im scraping by — canonical "DoorDash for a cushion"
  • 2025 09 20 on Austin
  • 2020 11 15 scholarship essays
  • 2021 04 15 restaurant todos
